top_signals.title: Ousted BP Chair Says He Was Fired Without Explanation
top_signals.summary:
BP's former Chairman Albert Manifold says he was fired without warning or explanation and will challenge the company's version of events.

Manifold was fired on Tuesday after eight months on the job, as Ruth David explains. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Defense Firm CSG’s Founder Seeks Money to Expand New Group
top_signals.summary: The founder of CSG NV, which completed the biggest ever initial public offering for a pure defense company four months ago, is seeking to raise as much as €200 million ($233 million) this year to expand his industrial group.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Alabama asks Supreme Court to allow congressional map that dilutes Black vote
top_signals.summary: A three-judge panel in Birmingham, Alabama, found that the state's proposed map of House districts was 'intentionally discriminatory."
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Treasury Yields Fall as Markets Watch Tense Talks Over Hormuz - WSJ
top_signals.summary: Treasury Yields Fall as Markets Watch Tense Talks Over Hormuz  WSJ
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
